---
title: "David William Stanley Ogilvy, 12th Earl of Airlie"
---

## David William Stanley Ogilvy, 12th Earl of Airlie

**Dates:** (1856-11 June 1900)

### Description

army officer

### Biography

He married (1886) Lady Mabell Frances Elizabeth Gore (d. 1956) and was killed in action at Diamond Hill, Pretoria. [PB Airlie]

### Letters

- Letter from July 9th      [1900]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
